examples: The feeding of dairy cows has undergone a revolution.
She had undergone an amazing metamorphosis from awkward schoolgirl to beautiful woman.
The Sahara is a highly diverse, albeit dry, region that has undergone major climatic changes since 10,000 B.C.
Skydog has undergone extensive in-home testing by more than 75 users with overwhelmingly positive feedback.
Luckily, in just the last few years, the city has undergone a beer garden wiedergeburt (rebirth).
